summary: Completed testing of Void/Cancellation System with inventory tracking. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend VoidReasonModal dialog verified with all required components: reason selector, Retorna/Merma badges, inventory toggle, and comments field.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cancellation-reasons - returns reasons with return_to_inventory field
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/send-kitchen - deducts inventory automatically when products have recipes
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/cancel-item/{item_id} - single item cancellation with reason_id, return_to_inventory, comments
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/cancel-items - bulk cancellation works with item_ids array
Backend: GET /api/void-audit-logs - returns audit logs with filtering (order_id, user_id, from_date, to_date, limit)
Backend: POST /api/bills/{id}/pay - does NOT deduct inventory (moved to send-kitchen)
Backend: Void audit logs contain void_type (single_item/multiple_items), reason, user info, restored_to_inventory flag
Backend: Cancellation reasons have return_to_inventory boolean for default behavior
Frontend: VoidReasonModal dialog opens when clicking trash icon on order items
Frontend: Cancel reasons display with 'Retorna' (green) or 'Merma' (red) badges based on return_to_inventory
Frontend: Inventory toggle ('¿Devolver a Inventario?') present and auto-adjusts based on reason selected
Frontend: Comments field ('Comentarios (opcional)') present for additional notes
Frontend: Confirm button ('Anular') disabled until reason is selected
Frontend: Cancel button closes dialog without action
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is well organized with proper separation between inventory deduction at send-kitchen and void handling
Audit logging is comprehensive with all required fields for traceability
The toggle auto-adjust based on reason selection is a good UX pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: Void/Cancellation system is fully functional. Inventory is deducted at send-kitchen (not at payment). Cancel dialog shows Retorna/Merma badges and allows manual toggle override. All void operations are logged to void_audit_logs collection. Products without recipes won't show inventory changes since there's nothing to deduct/restore.

send_to_kitchen_inventory_deduction.behavior: Automatically deducts inventory for products with recipes when items are sent to kitchen. Sets inventory_deducted=true on items.

bill_payment_no_inventory_deduction.note: Inventory deduction removed from payment - now happens at send_to_kitchen

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
